items.title: Musely secures $360M from General Catalyst without giving up equity
items.summary: The DTC skin, hair, and and menopause care brand will use the non-dilutive capital to super-charge customer acquisition.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.summary: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Waymo Is Trying to Crack Down on Solo Kids in Driverless Cars
items.summary: As adult riders report new age-verification checks, the self-driving car company says it’s continuing to “refine” its system in places where kids aren’t allowed to ride alone.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
